description: Instantly engages every new lead with multi-channel acknowledgment (email and optional SMS), enriches lead data, scores leads, assigns to team members, and creates follow-up tasks—all automatically when a lead is created.
outcome: Every new lead gets instant, personalized engagement. Smart scoring and routing. Automatic follow-up tasks.

templates.subject: Welcome to {{tenant.business_name}}, {{lead_first_name}}!
templates.body:
Hi {{lead_first_name}},

Welcome! We're excited to connect with {{lead_company || 'you'}}.

Our team specializes in {{tenant.service_focus}} and we'd love to explore how we can help.

A member of our team will reach out shortly to discuss your needs.

In the meantime, feel free to reply to this email with any questions.

Best regards,
{{tenant.owner_first_name}}
{{tenant.business_name}}
Hi {{lead_first_name}}! Thanks for your interest in {{tenant.business_name}}. A team member will contact you soon. Reply STOP to opt out.

templates.subject: New Lead Assigned: {{lead_name}} (Score: {{lead_score}})

test_matrix.happy_path: Lead created → Data enriched → Lead scored → Welcome email sent → SMS sent (if enabled) → Lead assigned → Assignee notified → Task created
test_matrix.no_email: Lead without email → Email skipped → SMS sent if phone exists → Assignment proceeds
test_matrix.high_score_lead: Lead scores above 80 → Priority task created → Immediate assignee notification
test_matrix.existing_customer: Lead marked as existing customer → Module actions skipped → CRM only
test_matrix.sms_disabled: SMS capability disabled → Email sent only → No SMS attempt → Workflow completes
test_matrix.assignment_failure: Assignment fails → Lead created and engaged anyway → Admin alert generated → Manual routing needed

downgrade_behavior: Module disabled. New leads no longer auto-engaged. Existing leads preserved. All configuration settings retained for reactivation.

documentation.setup_guide: Configure email capability. Optionally enable SMS. Choose assignment method and lead scoring model. Customize welcome email template.
known_limitations: Requires email address for all leads
Enrichment depends on external data provider availability
Scoring accuracy improves with historical data
documentation.support_runbook: Verify email service active → Check SMS capability if enabled → Confirm CRM integration → Test with sample lead creation
